texts.label: text
texts.orig: Only green or earth colors 4X4 Land Cruisers or Land Rovers vehicles are acceptable Mara North Conservancy.
texts.text: Only green or earth colors 4X4 Land Cruisers or Land Rovers vehicles are acceptable Mara North Conservancy.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Welcome cocktail, breakfast, lunch and dinner, afternoon tea, cookies, early morning tea/coffee/hot chocolate Two airstrip transfers, two shared day game drives daily in Mara North Conservancy
texts.text: Welcome cocktail, breakfast, lunch and dinner, afternoon tea, cookies, early morning tea/coffee/hot chocolate Two airstrip transfers, two shared day game drives daily in Mara North Conservancy

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Welcome cocktail, breakfast, lunch and dinner, afternoon tea, cookies, early morning tea/coffee/hot chocolate Two airstrip transfers, two shared day game drives daily in Mara North Conservancy and one night game drive in Mara North Conservancy Laundry, one sundowner, one bush meal, one eco walk Tea, coffee, snacks, soft drinks, local beer and house wine Cocktails and spirits are served after 18:00.
texts.text: Welcome cocktail, breakfast, lunch and dinner, afternoon tea, cookies, early morning tea/coffee/hot chocolate Two airstrip transfers, two shared day game drives daily in Mara North Conservancy and one night game drive in Mara North Conservancy Laundry, one sundowner, one bush meal, one eco walk Tea, coffee, snacks, soft drinks, local beer and house wine Cocktails and spirits are served after 18:00.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mara North conservancy fee : $130 Per Adult per night and  $65 per child per night for Non Residents Mara North conservancy fee : Ksh. 3,000 Per Adult per night and  Ksh. 1,500 per child per night for Residents Maasai Mara National Reserve Park entry fees, exclusive use of vehicles and temporary Flying Doctors evacuation cover Extra activities such as Balloon Safari, massage and spa, charged  phone calls and any payable extra service Personal insurance, domestic flights, gratuity and other statutory increases
texts.text: Mara North conservancy fee : $130 Per Adult per night and  $65 per child per night for Non Residents Mara North conservancy fee : Ksh. 3,000 Per Adult per night and  Ksh. 1,500 per child per night for Residents Maasai Mara National Reserve Park entry fees, exclusive use of vehicles and temporary Flying Doctors evacuation cover Extra activities such as Balloon Safari, massage and spa, charged  phone calls and any payable extra service Personal insurance, domestic flights, gratuity and other statutory increases

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Royal Mara additional room supplement of US$ 100 will apply on Easter Holiday and December 24th, 25th, 26th,  31st & January 1st 2026 plus 2 nights minimum stay over Easter and Christmas / New Year. All reservations must be prepaid in full at least 30 days and 60 days in peak season prior to the guest's arrival.
texts.text: Royal Mara additional room supplement of US$ 100 will apply on Easter Holiday and December 24th, 25th, 26th,  31st & January 1st 2026 plus 2 nights minimum stay over Easter and Christmas / New Year. All reservations must be prepaid in full at least 30 days and 60 days in peak season prior to the guest's arrival.
